name: infra-ts-monorepo
description: infra-ts: a typed, live-reconciled, open standard for infrastructure and config as code (no attribute state).
author: Andre Landgraf <andre@neon.tech>

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@infra-ts/core' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/runtime' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/neon' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/vercel' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/upstash' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/resend' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/mux' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/sentry' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/workos' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/sanity' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/statsig' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/dub' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/stripe' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/stripe-projects' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/posthog' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/elevenlabs' build && bun run --filter '@infra-ts/openai' build && bun run --filter 'infra-ts' build
